parameters.text: =⚠️ High token usage: {{ $json.claude_input_tokens }} input tokens on document from {{ $json.submitter_email }} ({{ $json.document_type }}). Review for oversized content. Job ID: {{ $json.job_id }}

parameters.content:
##  Ingestion & Early Validation
Webhook receives the document payload, validates and deduplicates before responding. Invalid or duplicate submissions are rejected before any processing begins.

## Document Acquisition
Routes the payload down one of two paths depending on whether a URL or raw text was submitted.

## LLM Extraction & Classification
Sends the document to the LLM with a structured prompt and parses the JSON result into a normalised output item.

## Risk Routing & Alerting
Classifies the document by risk level and fires parallel side-effects for HIGH risk documents and high token usage.

## Delivery & Callback
Logs the result to the audit sheet, then optionally fires a callback to the originating system if a URL was provided.

## Global Error Failsafe
Independent trigger that catches any workflow execution failure and posts a structured alert to Slack.

## Claude-Powered Legal & Financial Document Extraction

### How it works
1. **Ingest**: Validates and deduplicates before responding to the webhook. Invalid or duplicate submissions are rejected early.
2. **Acquire**: Routes to SSRF-guarded download (PDF/binary) or inline text path. File size is checked before extraction.
3. **Extract**: Prompt is built with injection defences and sent to Claude Sonnet 4.6. Response is parsed into a structured JSON item.
4. **Route**: HIGH risk triggers email and Slack alerts. A parallel branch monitors token usage and fires a Slack nudge above 40k tokens.
5. **Log**: Full extraction result appended to Google Sheets including risk factors, parties, token counts, and job ID.
6. **Deliver**: If a callback_url was provided, the extraction result is POSTed back to the upstream system.

### Setup steps
- [x] Anthropic Chat Model connected (Claude Sonnet 4.6)
- [ ] Connect Google Sheets OAuth2 credential to Log to Google Sheets
- [ ] Set GSHEETS_SPREADSHEET_ID env var
- [ ] Set GSHEETS_SHEET_NAME env var
- [ ] Set SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL env var (High Risk Alert, High Token Alert, Pipeline Error)
- [ ] Set ALERT_FROM_EMAIL and ALERT_TO_EMAIL env vars
- [ ] Connect SMTP credential to Email: High Risk Alert
- [ ] Set ALLOWED_DOWNLOAD_DOMAINS env var (optional, comma-separated allowlist)
- [ ] Update claude_model in Workflow Config if switching model versions
- [ ] POST test payload to webhook path: process-document
